subject: [RFC PATCH 4/8] dax/kmem: add the user_numa opt-in (CAP_USER_NUMA) for private nodes

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds an opt-in feature called 'user_numa' that allows userspace to control memory residency on a private node via mempolicy and migration. The feature is enabled by setting the CAP_USER_NUMA capability, which requires administrative privileges. This change provides more fine-grained control over memory management for users with specific needs.
